prose:
**Frontier orbital energies of furan** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit off) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point calculation on input coordinates from furan.xyz (not geometry-optimized). SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy) = **6.2573602 eV**. HOMO = −6.3597638 eV; LUMO = −0.1024036 eV. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy. No warnings.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
